features.name: queue pop_front as nonblocking assignment rvalue
features.description: Code should include a queue pop_front() method call used as the rvalue of a non-blocking assignment (<=) inside an always_ff block

features.name: queue push_back in function context
features.description: Code should include a queue push_back() method call inside a function definition, where the function is intended for DPI export

features.name: queue blocking and nonblocking access to same queue variable
features.description: Code should include the pattern of a queue variable that is written via push_back in a function and read via pop_front rvalue in an always_ff non-blocking assignment
